researchResults.title: How to avoid the teleoperation trap in robotics development
researchResults.description:
Teleoperation is necessary for training humanoid robots, but reinforcement learning and simulation are still necessary, says Flexion's CEO.

The post How to avoid the teleoperation trap in robotics development appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Building robots for unpredictable, infrastructure-free environments
researchResults.description:
Real-world robotics success requires building infrastructure-free systems that thrive in unpredictable, harsh outdoor environments.

The post Building robots for unpredictable, infrastructure-free environments appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: BrainCo demonstrates brain-controlled robot AI platform
researchResults.description:
During BrainCo's demo, the mind-controlled robotic arm completed tasks that require precision, such as grasping a cup or picking up an apple.

The post BrainCo demonstrates brain-controlled robot AI platform appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Boston Dynamics to discuss the art behind human-robot interaction
researchResults.description:
Boston Dynamics experts will share insights into design considerations for safe human-robot interaction in a webinar.

The post Boston Dynamics to discuss the art behind human-robot interaction appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: AGIBOT unveils four embodied AI products for real-world operations at WAIC
researchResults.description:
AGIBOT said its demoes and industrial deployments show its progress in turning embodied AI capabilities into repeatable workflows.

The post AGIBOT unveils four embodied AI products for real-world operations at WAIC appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
researchResults.description: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.

researchResults.title: Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
researchResults.description: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.

researchResults.title: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
researchResults.description: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

researchResults.title: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
researchResults.description: Under the new system, the protocol will take a looser, "stateless" approach to session IDs on the server side, similar to how most ordinary websites already work.

researchResults.title: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
researchResults.description: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.
